title: EVA 03 RoE homage to Granzeboma Spoilers

wikitext:
[]: EVA-03 RoE homage to Granzeboma? (Spoilers)             Quote Post by Dark doom » Sat Jul 10, 2010 10:44 am OK, here's something I noticed the other day. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: EVA-03 RoE homage to Granzeboma? (Spoilers)             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sat Jul 10, 2010 11:01 am Dark doom wrote: So am I just seeing thing's?

[]: I do that sometimes. Hallucinate.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sat Jul 10, 2010 6:42 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sat Jul 10, 2010 8:27 pm I only saw the movie once but I'm sure the arms came out of the shoulders, not the elbows.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Sun Jul 11, 2010 11:33 am My eye's where dissiveing me, your both right, they did come out of it's shoulders. Still, shouldn't that mean I could be more correct? Not trying to sound like a snob by saying that............

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Jul 11, 2010 1:57 pm

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sun Jul 11, 2010 5:07 pm Well, it could be coincidence... at least it's obviously not the first creature to have that... it could be just there to differentiate itself from the NGE TV series version of Bardiel... either that, or your theory might be correct...
